title: RTP Plugin
description: A Plugin to randomly teleport you
body:
This Plugin allows you to Randomly Teleport you with /rtp

it also checks if it is a safe Place to teleport to

is you are the Server Owner you can also change the range that you can teleport to in the Plugins config file

and if you have the permission "rtp.other" you can also rtp other players just by giving the command an argument /rtp <player>
